title: plan
description: The planner agent's typed, phased plan. Items in the same phase run IN PARALLEL in separate worktrees against the same base branch — they must not touch the same files; ordering and build-on relations are expressed through phase and depends_on.

summary.description: One paragraph: how the material decomposes and why this phasing is parallel-safe.

id.description: Git-ref-safe slug (lowercase [a-z0-9-]); it names the item's branch.

goal.description: One sentence the dev agent implements.

scope_out.description: Hard walls the item must never touch.

phase.description: 1 = no prerequisites; same-phase items run in parallel.

depends_on.description: Ids of items whose MERGED output this item needs.

feedback.description: Always the empty string — the machinery fills it when an item cycles.
